seoTitle: Arlington Public Schools Calendar 2026-2027: Key Dates & PDF
seoDescription: Arlington Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar with first and last days, holidays, breaks, early releases, official PDF, and ICS download.
calendarNotes: This page covers the APS school year calendar for districtwide K-12 dates, with the separate PreK and VPI start date shown where the official calendar lists it. Early release labels keep the grade-level scope from the APS PDF, including elementary-only, districtwide, and high school early release periods. High school block schedule details may appear in a separate APS file, and school-level events or weather updates should be confirmed through APS and individual school announcements.

calendarFaqs.q: When do APS PreK and VPI students start in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The APS calendar lists the first day for PreK and VPI students as Tuesday, September 1, 2026. K-12 students start one day earlier on Monday, August 31, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Additional No-School Weekdays
yearNumbers.detail: Includes the two Labor Day closure weekdays (September 4 and September 7), Yom Kippur, October 12, November 3, Veterans Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, January 29, Presidents Day, Eid al-Fitr, April 19, Eid al-Adha, and Memorial Day. Thanksgiving, Winter Break, Spring Break, and early-release days are excluded.

yearNumbers.label: Scheduled Early-Release Periods
yearNumbers.detail: APS lists 11 scheduled early-release events covering 18 scheduled school days, including the early-release last day of school. The events include districtwide early release, elementary parent-teacher conference early release, elementary early release, and high school early release dates.

whatsNew.title: What's New for 2026-2027
content: The first day moves from August 25 in 2025-2026 to August 31 in 2026-2027, six calendar days later.
The last day moves from June 18 in 2025-2026 to June 17 in 2026-2027, one calendar day earlier.
Spring Break moves from March 30-April 3 in 2025-2026 to March 22-26 in 2026-2027, starting eight calendar days earlier.
